sections.heading: Tournament Details
sections.content:
Annual Youth Association Tournament for young bowlers.

  • Date: November 1–2 / 8–9 / 15–16, 2025
  • Location: Electric City Lanes, Kaukauna
  • Entry Fee: See entry form
  • Status: Completed
  • Contact: Beth Kosiorek — bethkusbc@gmail.com
